en: Woe to the bloody city, all full of lies and plunder- no end to the prey!
zh: 這流人血的城，有禍了！ 全城欺詐， 充滿劫掠； 搶奪的事總不止息。

en: The crack of the whip, and rumble of the wheel, galloping horse and bounding chariot!
zh: 鞭聲颼颼， 輪聲轔轔， 駿馬奔馳， 戰車顛簸跳動。

en: Horsemen charging, flashing sword and glittering spear, hosts of slain, heaps of corpses, dead bodies without end- they stumble over the bodies!
zh: 騎兵騰躍衝鋒； 刀劍爍爍發亮， 槍矛閃閃生光； 被殺的人眾多， 死屍成堆； 屍體無數， 眾人都被屍體絆倒。

en: And all for the countless whorings of the prostitute, graceful and of deadly charms, who betrays nations with her whorings, and peoples with her charms.
zh: 都因妓女多有淫行， 施邪術的美麗女巫， 藉著她的淫行誘惑列國， 藉著她的邪術欺騙萬族。

en: Behold, I am against you, declares the LORD of hosts, and will lift up your skirts over your face; and I will make nations look at your nakedness and kingdoms at your shame.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華說： 看哪！我必攻擊你； 我要把你的裙子掀到你的臉上， 使萬國看見你赤身露體， 使列邦看見你的羞恥。

en: I will throw filth at you and treat you with contempt and make you a spectacle.
zh: 我要把污穢可憎之物拋在你身上， 侮辱你，使你成為眾人觀看的對象。

en: And all who look at you will shrink from you and say, Wasted is Nineveh; who will grieve for her? Where shall I seek comforters for you?
zh: 看見你的都必逃避你，說： “尼尼微荒涼了； 有誰為她悲哀呢？” 我在哪裡可以找到安慰你的人呢？

en: Are you better than Thebes that sat by the Nile, with water around her, her rampart a sea, and water her wall?
zh: 你比挪亞們還強嗎？ 挪亞們位於尼羅河流域， 周圍有水環繞； 海是她的屏障， 水作她的牆垣。

en: Cush was her strength; Egypt too, and that without limit; Put and the Libyans were her helpers.
zh: 古實和埃及，是她無窮的力量， 弗人和路比族，是她的 助手。

en: Yet she became an exile; she went into captivity; her infants were dashed in pieces at the head of every street; for her honored men lots were cast, and all her great men were bound in chains.
zh: 然而她卻被遷徙， 被擄去了； 她的嬰孩在各街頭被摔死； 人們為她的尊貴人抽籤。 她所有的達官貴人都被鎖鍊捆著。

en: You also will be drunken; you will go into hiding; you will seek a refuge from the enemy.
zh: 至於你，你必喝醉， 必被隱藏； 你必因仇敵的緣故， 尋找避難所。

en: All your fortresses are like fig trees with first-ripe figs- if shaken they fall into the mouth of the eater.
zh: 你一切堡壘，如同無花果樹上初熟的果子， 若被搖撼， 就必落在想吃的人口中。

en: Behold, your troops are women in your midst. The gates of your land are wide open to your enemies; fire has devoured your bars.
zh: 看哪！在你裡面的人都是婦女， 你境內的門戶， 都向仇敵敞開； 你的門閂被火燒毀。

en: Draw water for the siege; strengthen your forts; go into the clay; tread the mortar; take hold of the brick mold!
zh: 你要打水，以備圍困， 鞏固你的堡壘， 踹泥踏土， 緊握磚模。

en: There will the fire devour you; the sword will cut you off. It will devour you like the locust. Multiply yourselves like the locust; multiply like the grasshopper!
zh: 在那裡火要燒滅你， 刀劍要除滅你， 吞吃你，好像吞吃蚱蜢一樣， 你只管增多如蚱蜢， 加添像蝗蟲，

en: You increased your merchants more than the stars of the heavens. The locust spreads its wings and flies away.
zh: 你增加了你的商人， 多過天上的星辰。 蚱蜢退了殼，就飛去了。

en: Your princes are like grasshoppers, your scribes like clouds of locusts settling on the fences in a day of cold- when the sun rises, they fly away; no one knows where they are.
zh: 你的領袖多如蝗蟲， 你的軍長像一群群的螞蚱； 天涼的時候，停留在籬笆上； 太陽一出，就都飛走了； 沒有人知道牠們在甚麼地方。

en: Your shepherds are asleep, O king of Assyria; your nobles slumber. Your people are scattered on the mountains with none to gather them.
zh: 亞述王啊！你的牧人睡覺， 你的貴族安歇， 你的子民分散在各山上， 沒有人招聚他們。

en: There is no easing your hurt; your wound is grievous. All who hear the news about you clap their hands over you. For upon whom has not come your unceasing evil?
zh: 你的創傷無法醫治； 你受的打擊非常嚴重。 聽見你這消息的， 都必向你鼓掌； 因為你不斷行惡， 誰沒有受過害呢？
